title: paeonia mascula var. lusitanica
intro: Paeonia mascula var. lusitanica, also known as the Portuguese peony or Lusitanica peony, is a variety of the Paeonia mascula plant, a flowering perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Paeonia mascula var. lusitanica include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Paeonia mascula var. lusitanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
